meta.title: DEF CON 33 - 40 Years Of Phrack: Hacking, Zines & Digital Dissent -richinseattle, Netspooky, Chompie
meta.description: For 40 years, Phrack has published papers from the hacker underground. Join us as we discuss the evolution of hacking, hacker zines/culture, information security, and the role Phrack has played in all three. We will discuss the history of Phrack, the latest reboot and 40th anniversary production, followed by a panel of authors and contributors.
